info.name: SAP BI Tools SAP Analytics Cloud API
info.description:
RESTful API for SAP Analytics Cloud enabling programmatic access to system data stored on an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant. The API provides endpoints for managing stories, models, users, teams, calendars, and other resources. It supports SCIM 2.0 for user provisioning, OData for data access, and standard REST patterns for content management. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with SAML bearer assertion or authorization code grant flows.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: SAP BI Tools Get a story by ID

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the story

request.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific story identified by its unique story ID. Returns the story metadata, structure, and optionally the models used within it.

item.name: SAP BI Tools Create a user (SCIM 2.0)

request.description: Creates a new user in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Requires user profile attributes including userName, name, and email. Returns the created user record with its assigned ID.

request.description: Retrieves a list of calendar events and tasks configured in SAP Analytics Cloud. Calendars support planning workflows, scheduling notifications, and organizing collaborative tasks.
